errors.formattedMessage:
Warning: It looks like you are using '<address payable>.send/transfer(<X>)'.
Using '<address payable>.send/transfer(<X>)' is deprecated and strongly discouraged!
The resolc compiler uses a heuristic to detect '<address payable>.send/transfer(<X>)' calls,
which disables call re-entrancy and supplies all remaining gas instead of the 2300 gas stipend.
However, detection is not guaranteed. You are advised to carefully test this, employ
re-entrancy guards or use the withdrawal pattern instead!
Learn more on https://docs.soliditylang.org/en/latest/security-considerations.html#reentrancy
and https://docs.soliditylang.org/en/latest/common-patterns.html#withdrawal-from-contracts

--> contracts/DotVault.sol
errors.message:
Warning: It looks like you are using '<address payable>.send/transfer(<X>)'.
Using '<address payable>.send/transfer(<X>)' is deprecated and strongly discouraged!
The resolc compiler uses a heuristic to detect '<address payable>.send/transfer(<X>)' calls,
which disables call re-entrancy and supplies all remaining gas instead of the 2300 gas stipend.
However, detection is not guaranteed. You are advised to carefully test this, employ
re-entrancy guards or use the withdrawal pattern instead!
Learn more on https://docs.soliditylang.org/en/latest/security-considerations.html#reentrancy
and https://docs.soliditylang.org/en/latest/common-patterns.html#withdrawal-from-contracts

documentation.text: @notice Bond `amount` native tokens for staking
@notice Bond an additional `amount` on top of an existing bond
@notice Begin unbonding `amount` tokens (subject to unbonding period)
@notice Nominate a list of validator addresses
@notice Returns the index of the currently active era
@notice Returns the total stake in a given era
@notice Returns the total validator reward paid out in a given era
@notice Send `amount` of native assets to `recipient` on parachain `paraId`
@notice Native assets precompile at 0x0000000000000000000000000000000000000806
@notice Returns the native asset balance of `account`
@notice Transfer `amount` native tokens from the caller to `to`
@notice Reverts when a zero amount is supplied where a positive value is required
@notice Reverts when a user attempts to withdraw more shares than they own
@notice Reverts when the caller is not the vault owner
@notice Reverts when the staking precompile returns an error
@notice Reverts when the XCM precompile returns an error
@notice Owner of the vault; may harvest yield and initiate cross-chain transfers
@notice Total vault shares outstanding across all depositors
@notice Per-address vault share balances
@dev Accept plain native token transfers (e.g. reward callbacks from precompiles)

@title Mock Contracts for DotVault Testing
 @notice Contains all mock precompiles used for testing DotVault contract

eceive"}],"devdoc":{"events":{"CrossChainTransfer(uint32,address,uint256)":{"params":{"amount":"Amount of tokens transferred","paraId":"Target parachain ID","recipient":"Recipient address on the destination parachain"}},"Deposited(address,uint256,uint256)":{"params":{"assets":"Amount of native tokens deposited","depositor":"Address that performed the deposit","shares":"Number of vault shares minted"}},"Withdrawn(address,uint256,uint256)":{"params":{"assets":"Amount of native tokens returned","shares":"Number of vault shares burned","withdrawer":"Address that performed the withdrawal"}},"YieldHarvested(uint32,uint256)":{"params":{"era":"Era index from which yield was collected","yield":"Total reward amount harvested"}}},"kind":"dev","methods":{"balanceOf(address)":{"params":{"account":"Address to query"},"returns":{"_0":"Number of shares held by `account`"}},"bridgeYieldToParachain(uint32,address,uint256)":{"params":{"amount":"Amount of native tokens to transfer","paraId":"Destination parachain ID","recipient":"Recipient address on the destination chain"}},"deposit()":{"details":"Send native tokens as msg.value. No ERC-20 approval required."},"depositorCount()":{"returns":{"count":" Number of addresses that hold a non-zero share balance"}},"estimatedAPY()":{"returns":{"apy":" Estimated APY in basis points (100 bps = 1 %)"}},"harvestYield(uint32,uint256,uint64)":{"params":{"amount":"Minimum expected reward (reverts if reward is zero; use as a slippage guard)","paraId":"Parachain ID parameter (reserved for future XCM reward-claim routing)","weight":"XCM execution weight (reserved for future reward-claim calls)"}},"sharePrice()":{"returns":{"price":" Native assets per vault share (1e18 = 1.0)"}},"withdraw(uint256)":{"params":{"shares":"Number of vault shares to burn"}}},"version":1},"userdoc":{"errors":{"InsufficientShares()":[{"notice":"Reverts when a user attempts to withdraw more shares than they own"}],"NotOwner()":[{"notice":"Reverts when the caller is not the vault owner"}],"StakingFailed()":[{"notice":"Reverts when the staking precompile returns an error"}],"XCMFailed()":[{"notice":"Reverts when the XCM precompile returns an error"}],"ZeroAmount()":[{"notice":"Reverts when a zero amount is supplied where a positive value is required"}]},"events":{"CrossChainTransfer(uint32,address,uint256)":{"notice":"Emitted when assets are bridged to another parachain via XCM"},"Deposited(address,uint256,uint256)":{"notice":"Emitted when a user deposits native assets and receives vault shares"},"Withdrawn(address,uint256,uint256)":{"notice":"Emitted when a user redeems vault shares and receives native assets"},"YieldHarvested(uint32,uint256)":{"notice":"Emitted when staking rewards are harvested and compounded into the vault"}},"kind":"user","methods":{"balanceOf(address)":{"notice":"Returns the vault share balance of `account`"},"bridgeYieldToParachain(uint32,address,uint256)":{"notice":"Transfer assets cross-chain to a recipient on another parachain via the XCM precompile."},"deposit()":{"notice":"Deposit native tokens (DOT) into the vault.         Mints shares proportional to the caller's contribution relative to totalDeposited.         As yield is harvested, totalDeposited grows, so later depositors receive fewer shares         per token \u2014 preserving the share price for existing holders.         The deposited value is immediately bonded through the staking precompile."},"depositorCount()":{"notice":"Returns the total number of depositors currently holding shares.         NOTE: This implementation tracks count via an internal counter for gas efficiency.         A production vault should use OpenZeppelin's EnumerableSet for enumeration."},"estimatedAPY()":{"notice":"Estimates the annualised yield based on the last completed era reward.         Formula: APY (bps) = lastEraReward * erasPerYear * 10_000 / totalDeposited         Assumes 1 era \u2248 6 hours on Polkadot \u2192 1 460 eras per year."},"harvestYield(uint32,uint256,uint64)":{"notice":"Harvest staking rewards for the last completed era and compound them into totalDeposited.         Compounding increases the share price, distributing yield proportionally to all holders         without requiring any share minting."},"owner()":{"notice":"Owner of the vault; may harvest yield and initiate cross-chain transfers"},"sharePrice()":{"notice":"Returns the current share price as assets-per-share, scaled by 1e18.         The price increases monotonically as yield is harvested and compounded."},"totalDeposited()":{"notice":"Cumulative native assets deposited (principal + compounded yield)         Increases on deposit and on yield harvest; decreases on withdrawal.         Share price = totalDeposited / totalShares"},"totalShares()":{"notice":"Total vault shares outstanding across all depositors"},"withdraw(uint256)":{"notice":"Redeem `shares` vault shares and receive the proportional underlying assets.         The equivalent asset amount is unbonded from the staking precompile.         Note: unbonded tokens are subject to the Polkadot unbonding period before transfer."}},"version":1}},"settings":{"compilationTarget":{"contracts/DotVault.sol":"DotVault"},"evmVersion":"cancun","libraries":{},"metadata":{"bytecodeHash":"ipfs"},"optimizer":{"details":{"constantOptimizer":false,"cse":false,"deduplicate":false,"inliner":false,"jumpdestRemover":false,"orderLiterals":false,"peephole":false,"simpleCounterForLoopUncheckedIncrement":true,"yul":true,"yulDetails":{"optimizerSteps":"dhfoDgvulfnTUtnIfxa[r]EscLMVcul [j]Trpeulxa[r]cLgvifMCTUca[r]LSsTFOtfDnca[r]IulcscCTUtgvifMx[scCTUt] TOntnfDIulgvifMjmul[jul] VcTOcul jmul:fDnTOcmuO","stackAllocation":true}},"runs":200},"remappings":[]},"sources":{"contracts/DotVault.sol":{"keccak256":"0x4facec2a19a2636e6f384f1c4e2c23d0bc257016e51b7b0e10616742de883291","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://74268ccedffbcbd4bee85b48d713bd8e52716572e50b8c977f259c24b04bab5d","dweb:/ipfs/QmTjY25buzUmensJzMxx5yUvpDecBH43zWTLfMjzRcrVhm"]}},"version":1}
